reviews.review_description: If you happened to get this game for free, cool. That's the only reason it's worth grabbing, and the only reason it gets more than one star. I can't believe it actually cost 20 dollars at one point. It's a very poorly done ripoff of SUPERHOT.

reviews.review_title: ONE OF THE MOST FUN GAMES EVER
reviews.review_description:
this game is spectacular there are a lot of levels it is a very fun game the amount of possibilities of how to solve a level makes it very replayable there are many weapons and many ways to kill in different scenarios from farms to airplanes banks there is everything. i really had fun playing this game if it catches your attention give it a try i promise you it is worth it. 

The only thing I would like would be to improve the physics of the weapons as having two shotguns one in each hand is not very realistic fun yes but not realistic xd

One question, how many achievements does this game have and what are they because since they removed scoreboards you can't see them anymore and seriously I would love to complete it to 100 =D
This is a super shot clone. It’s not bad and it’s not great. It’s kinda in between. Still fun though.
